name: CloudTrail log file validation disabled
description: CloudTrail log file validation is not enabled. Without it, attackers who compromise the S3 bucket can modify or delete audit logs without detection — removing all forensic evidence of their activity.
remediation: Enable log file validation: aws cloudtrail update-trail --name <trail> --enable-log-file-validation. Use aws cloudtrail validate-logs to periodically verify integrity. Store logs in a dedicated, locked-down S3 bucket with Object Lock.
